info.name: Losant Edge and Embedded Compute API

description.content:
Manage Edge Compute deployments to Linux gateways and Embedded Edge Agent (EEA) deployments to microcontrollers, including release management and edge workflow distribution. Derived from the Losant Platform API (Bravado/Swagger 2) at https://api.losant.com/.

Contact Support:
 Name: Losant Support
 Email: hello@losant.com
